message:
🐛 Filter button: icon-only with purple glow, no text (#4370)

Remove "All"/"Filtered" text label from filter button to prevent
navbar layout shift. Now shows just the funnel icon with:
- Purple background + glow when filters are active
- Small purple dot indicator in top-right corner
- Compact X button to clear filters (also icon-only)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
